text.title: Indie Hacker Tax and Legal Essentials Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding Indie Hacker Tax and Legal Essentials. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Output is an inventory + status, not legal advice. Final sign-off goes to a licensed lawyer / accountant in the operating jurisdiction.
rule.rationale: Self-prepared legal posture without local review is the indie-killer; methodology stops at inventory.

rule.statement: Entity choice (sole trader / LLC / Ltd / UAB / FOP / etc.) is recorded with rationale + registration evidence (file number, registration date).
rule.rationale: Operating without explicit entity = personal liability + tax mess; rationale prevents bikeshedding next quarter.

rule.statement: If selling to EU consumers, VAT MOSS / OSS or processor-of-record (Paddle, Lemon Squeezy, Stripe Tax) is in place from first sale.
rule.rationale: EU VAT has no minimum threshold for digital services to consumers; ignoring = back-taxes.

rule.statement: Customer-facing ToS + Privacy Policy live at /terms and /privacy; reference processor list; specify data-retention.
rule.rationale: Without published ToS, courts default against the operator; privacy policy is GDPR/CCPA prerequisite.

rule.statement: Inventory reviewed annually (or on entity / jurisdiction change). Stale inventory ≥18 months = re-run from scratch.
rule.rationale: Tax + privacy law changes faster than founders refresh; annual review catches drift.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-indie-hacker-tax-and-legal-essentials.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
